provider: Google Lyria with temporary production fallback
reason: The provider blocked additional generations with an unspecified policy response after the first approved section; Eleven Music was unavailable because its account had insufficient credits.
method: four low-loss arrangement variants of the approved original section, joined with eight-second equal-power crossfades
variants: slightly lowered-rate spatial variation with softened high-frequency balance
replacementPlan: When Google Lyria permits further calls, replace the four variants with independently generated 96 BPM C sharp minor sections and rerender only this project.
